title: いつか過ごした帰り道

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's the day that Special Week and I agreed upon to do some
training outside the academy. Or, well, that was the plan...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff...
choice_data_list: What's up? You seem out of it.
What's up? You seem out of it.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? D-do I? But I feel fine!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: A-all righty! Let's keep giving it our all today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I suspect that something is up with Special Week, but I let it go for
the time being to focus on her training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Then...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Phew! ♪ Another day, another great training session! I feel like I
could go for another round of running, though!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I have an idea! Trainer, how about I run on my way back? It'll be
like extra train—

text_block_list.name: Young Boy
text_block_list.text: Mommy! I want a croquette! I want it!

text_block_list.name: Mother
text_block_list.text:
If you eat now, you won't have any space for dinner! We're going
home, dear.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, it's nothing! It just reminded me of my own mom, that's all.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I also used to bug her for things and get scolded for it.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Of course I do! But... she's so far away. I can't just meet her on a whim.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: We did actually talk on the phone yesterday, though.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
She told me about our neighbor's cow and how it gave birth to a new
calf recently. She also talked about our carrots and how they're all
growing really big.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
We talked a lot, and well... It made me miss home, so I told her I
missed her carrot stew.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
She asked me if I was feeling down and if I was okay. She told me not
to push myself too hard. She sounded really worried.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I want to make Mom and Mama proud, but all I do is cause worry...
choice_data_list: So that's why you're out of it today.
So that's why you're out of it today.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Sigh... If only she were here now...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Then I'd be able to tell her in person—that it's a bit lonely, but I'm
still doing my best.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Oh... S-silly me. I shouldn't talk about this with you. I don't want to
cause you any more trouble than I already have.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, let's hurry up and go back to the academy! Wait, what's
that?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Over there... at the bookstore! Suzuka's on the front page of that
magazine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide to take a detour and stop by the bookstore to pick up a
copy of the magazine in question.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Isn't this magazine super famous?! I've even seen it back at
home in Hokkaido!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Suzuka's incredible, isn't she? She's always running in one race or
another.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Hm, I need to stop moping around and work hard enough to be on
the cover of magazines.
choice_data_list:
That would show your mom how well you're
doing too.

That would show your mom how well you're
doing too.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? What would? Oh wait, I get it.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
If I make to the front page of a magazine, I'd be able to show my
mom that I'm doing fine all on my own.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'm sure that'd make her happy!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Thanks, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
There might not be vast pastures here for me to run through, and my
favorite carrot fields might be missing, but...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'll still try my hardest! I'll do whatever it takes to become the best
version of myself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week solemnly gazes into the evening sky. Her complexion is
one of sadness, but her eyes tell a different story—the girl is nothing
if not determined.
